sentence: Never trust a labron's docderpeanemis written before the credits rolled.

wombos.definition: A peak cinema analysis that is written down or typed out — a documented, recorded breakdown of events or stories, often delivered in the form of a note or card.
wombos.example: She wrote a full docderpeanemis on every thank-you card she sent.

wombos.definition: A bro-son figure who is actively larping — someone with bron energy who is also performing or pretending to be something they are not.
wombos.example: Don't listen to that labron — he's been faking it since day one.
